answer:
To determine who earns the most in USD after an 8-hour day, convert each hourly wage to USD:

- **Navin**: \(160 \text{ MRU/hour} \times \frac{1 \text{ USD}}{32.35 \text{ MRU}} = 4.95 \text{ USD/hour}\)
- **Luka**: \(25 \text{ HRK/hour} \times \frac{1 \text{ USD}}{5.18 \text{ HRK}} = 4.83 \text{ USD/hour}\)
- **Ian**: \(34 \text{ BWP/hour} \times \frac{1 \text{ USD}}{6.95 \text{ BWP}} = 4.90 \text{ USD/hour}\)
